series_metadata.series_description: Forms submitted by employees of state agencies that are requesting varying levels of online access to state-owned bank accounts. Also includes documents and forms related to the granting, continuation, and termination of online access to state-owned bank accounts.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until conclusion of current fiscal year, and for an additional 2 fiscal years. ; Electronic: Retain until conclusion of current fiscal year, and for an additional 2 fiscal years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
